stories.headline: Who are the US CEOs in China with Trump, and what’s in it for them?
stories.description: Top executives hope to expand their businesses in China as Trump aims for win ahead of midterm vote.

stories.headline: Rescuers pull dead from rubble of Kyiv flats after massive Russian strikes
stories.description: Children are among the injured after Russia launched drones and missiles across Ukraine, officials say.

stories.headline: Streeting hails progress as key hospital waiting time milestone met
stories.description: Government his its interim target of 65% of patients in England being treated within 18 weeks.

stories.headline: Jeffries' job grows more difficult in race for House and speaker's gavel
stories.description: Jeffries' path to House Speaker faces challenges amid redistricting fallout.

stories.headline: Federal judge blocks US sanctions against UN rapporteur Francesca Albanese
stories.description: US sanctions imposed on UN expert Francesca Albanese by the Trump administration temporarily ⁠blocked by a judge.
